nasb.text: Now Saul’s watchmen in Gibeah of Benjamin looked, and behold, the multitude melted away; and they went here and there.

esv.text: And the watchmen of Saul in Gibeah of Benjamin looked, and behold, the multitude was dispersing here and there.

cnv.text: 在便雅憫的基比亞，掃羅的瞭望兵看見非利士人的大軍潰敗，四處逃竄。

ccb.text: 扫罗在便雅悯境内基比亚的哨兵看见非利士军队四散奔逃，溃不成军。
